title: Tempo into Threshold Ramp
description: Build from comfortable to painful progressively

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Relax. Breathe. Enjoy the ride. 8:24 of engine-building.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Aerobic base building. 65% for 8:24. This is the foundation of all fitness.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Building the base. 8:24 at 65%. This is where champions are made.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 65% FTP. This is so easy it's almost boring. Almost.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/5. 17:30 at 80%. This hurts because it's supposed to. Set the tone.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First rep: 17:30 at 80%. Focus on form and controlled execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/5. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/5. 17:30 at 80%. This seemed like a good idea. We'll see.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/5. Power: 80-80%, Cadence: 85-100 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 2/5. 13:18 at 90%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/1. 90% FTP, Seated. 13:18. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 2/5. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 3 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 2/5. 90% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 2/5. 90% FTP, 85-100 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 57% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 21 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 39 minutes in. 98% at 85-100 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 57% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 2 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 57% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 57% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 98%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 69% complete. Block 1/1. This is where you prove you're serious.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Progressive fatigue building. 39min threshold work accumulated. Maintain 85-100 rpm — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 1 blocks to go. 12 minutes. This discomfort is temporary. The fitness is permanent.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 47 minutes in. Your lactate threshold called. It's filing a complaint.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 69% into session. Seated at 85-100 rpm. Stay controlled — smooth is fast.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 55% for 4:12. Then 8min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 55% × 4:12. Then 8min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 4:12 at 55%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 55% for 4:12. Then 8min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 55% × 4:12. Seated, 85-100 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 87% done. 0 intervals left. 0 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 51min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 87% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
